creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to Mina Galić from comment #1)
MDEV-31129 is marked closed and as fixed for versions 10.11.3, 10.4.29, 10.5.20, 10.6.13, 10.8.8, 10.9.6, 10.10.4 but I haven't tested 10.6.13 yet.

I am more concerned by reported memory leaks
https://jira.mariadb.org/browse/MDEV-30848
This bug causes crashes every day, but is left unattended.
